Object.Field: <map-generation-info> <node name="IMP_OTSND_AVY" type="IKM" km="IKM Oracle Insert.GLOBAL"> <option name="CREATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="INSERT_HINT" value="APPEND PARALLEL" default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="CONSTRAINTS" value="None" default="true"/> <option name="TRUNCATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="DELETE_ALL" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="INDEXES" value="None" default="true"/> <option name="DROP_AND_CREATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> </node> <node name="IMP_OTSND_AVY" type="CKM" km="CKM Oracle RJ with Suffix.CDS"> <option name="CREATE_ERROR_INDEX" value="true" default="true"/> <option name="COMPATIBLE" value="9" default="true"/> <option name="VALIDATE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="E$_TABLENAME_SUFFIX" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="E$_TABLENAME_STATIC" value="true" default="true"/> </node> <node name="IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <target name="IMP_OTSND_AVY" resource="IMP_OTSND_AVY" model="CCAL_OWNER" logicalSchema="CCAL_OWNER" forcedContext=""/> </map-generation-info>

INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL */ INTO <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "IMP_OTSND_AVY", "CCAL_OWNER", "D") ?> ( IMP_OTSND_AVY_ID , RCV_DLV_TP_CODE , ACR_INT_AMT , ARB_NUM , CST_AC_NUM , TXN_PRC , GRP_CST_AC_NUM , GRP_CST_NM , SCR_CPN_STRK_PRC_AMT , SCR_PRIM_CMDTY_CODE , MAT_DT , MKT_CODE , POOL_NUM , IMT_TP_CODE , PNP_AMT , SD , RET_DT , TRDR_ID , TXN_DT , TXN_AMT , TXN_NUM , SCR_PRC , CNCL_X_REV_CODE , FNC_RATE , IMP_NUM_FA , CST_IMP_NUM_FA , OTSND_AVY_SORT_CODE , CLRD_AMT , EFF_STRT_OF_DAY_FAIL_AMT , FAIL_ADJ_AMT , TXN_RSN_CODE , JRNL_INSR_OVRD_F , TXN_CMSN_AMT , DEPST_AC_NUM , CST_AC_NM , SCR_NM , OTSND_DT , FNC_INT_TO_DT_AMT , OPN_F , USD_MRGN_AMT , MRGN_PCT , ACR_INT_TO_DT_AMT , TRD_PNP_W_ACR_INT_AMT , CLR_VAL , MKT_VAL , FNC_EXS_X_DEF_F , FRGN_CST_CTRY_CODE , BD_SORT_TP_CODE , PNP_PYDN_F , RCV_DLV_DRC_CODE , RET_DT_SORT_F , BKR_AC_NUM , EXP_DT , CTR_FACE_VAL , CRN_POOL_FCTR_RATE , MRGN_PNP_AMT , MTD_FNC_INT_AMT , FNC_INT_DRC_CODE , FNC_TOT_TP_CODE , FILE_CODE , FNC_GRP_TP_C_ODE , TDY_MARK_TO_MKT_VAL , ACG_TP_CODE , SCR_CCY_CODE , SETL_CCY_CODE , SPOT_EXG_RATE , FNC_ACR_CODE , PHYS_WIRE_F , ITNL_X_DMST_CODE , BWR_X_LOAN_FEE_FRQ_CODE , FAIL_PNP_AMT , FAIL_INT_AMT , CRN_FAIL_USD_AMT , CLRD_FAIL_USD_AMT , STRT_OF_DAY_FAIL_USD_AMT , FAIL_ADJ_USD_AMT , SBC_EXG_RATE , EX_DVDN_F , CUSIP_NUM , ISIN , FIRM_TRD_CPCTY_CODE , CST_TRD_CPCTY_CODE , CLR_VAL_W_HRCT_AMT , MRGN_W_HRCT_USD_AMT , MRGN_PCT_W_HRCT_RATE , CLC_HRCT_F , HRCT_RATE , AS_OF_TD , SFAS_123_RPT_INCL_F , SRC_CRT_TM , AVY_NUM_LINK , FNC_BKR_CHRG_AMT , TXN_FEE_AMT , RATE_EFF_DT , FIRM_CMSN_AMT , PNDG_ACR_INT_TO_DT_AMT , FIRM_MNY_DEPST_AC , PYMT_MODE_CODE , BKR_OTHR_CODE_DEALER , FNC_TP_CODE , NORMD_TXN_AMT , EXT_TRD_SRC_CODE , PNP_TRDR_NM , ENT_X_COST_CNTR_CODE , TP_CODE_SBO , NORMD_TD_OTSND_AMT , NORMD_ALCT_TBA_AMT , NORMD_TBA_OFF_AMT_PAIR , USR_PRFL_NM , OFF_CNTL_AMT_PAIR , RPRCH_CTR_W_HRCT_VAL , RPRCH_DDCN_AMT , HRCT_EXS_AMT , HRCT_DEF_AMT , HRCT_VAL , CLS_ASK_PRC , BID_PRC , TXN_FEE_2_AMT , DLV_DT , CTRY_CODE , PCS_F , NUM_SEDOL , NORMD_LNKD_TRD_TOT_AMT , PRC_DIRTY , ORIG_FNC_TENOR_TP_CODE , TAX_WHLD_AMT , TAX_TP_CODE , TAX_RATE , DFLT_FATCA_WHLD_PCT , FATCA_TAX_WHLD_AMT , NRA_TAX_WHLD_AMT , DROP_THR_BOND_RATE , NRA_TAX_DROP_THR_WHLD_AMT , FATCA_TAX_CR_AMT , MBS_POOL_TXN_TP_CODE , CST_TBA_MRGN_CODE , EXT_VRSN_NUM , PREV_TXN_ID , THEO_LOAN_VAL , REPO_MARK_TO_MKT_VAL , REPO_MARK_TO_MKT_PRC , CRT_DTM , CRT_USR_NM , LAST_UDT_DTM , LAST_UDT_USR_NM , CALC_PAR_TXN_PRC_AMT ) SELECT CDS_STG_OWNER.SEQ_IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NEXTVAL , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RCV_DELIVER_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ACCRUED_INT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ARBITRAGE_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUST_ACCT_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_TRANS_PRICE_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.GRP_CUST_ACCT_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.GRP_CUST_ACCT_NAME , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_COUPON_STRIKE_PRICE_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_PRI_COMMODITY_CODE , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_MATURITY_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_MATURITY_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_MATURITY_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MKT_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_SUFFIX_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.INSTRUMENT_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PRINCIPAL_AMT , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_SD_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_SD_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_SD_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RETURN_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RETURN_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RETURN_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRADER_ID , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_PRICE_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CXL_REVISE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_FINANCE_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SALESPRSN_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUSTS_SALESPRSN_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.OUTSTANDING_ACTY_SORT_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CLEARED_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EFF_START_OF_DY_FAIL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FAIL_ADJ_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.REASON_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.JOURNAL_INSTR_OVERRIDE_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_COMM_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DEPOSITORY_ACCT_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUST_ACCT_NAME , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_NAME , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.OUTSTANDING_ACTY_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.OUTSTANDING_ACTY_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.OUTSTANDING_ACTY_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_INT_TO_DT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.OPEN_CLOSE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MARGIN_MONEY_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MARGIN_PCT_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ACCRUED_INT_TO_DT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRADE_MONEY_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.COLLATERAL_VAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MKT_VAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_EXCESS_DEFICIT_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FRGN_CUST_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BROKER_DEALER_SORT_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PRINCIPAL_PAYDOWN_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RCV_DELIVER_DIRECTION_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.RETURN_DT_SORT_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BROKER_ACCT_NUM , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EXP_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EXP_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EXP_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FACE_VAL_CONTRACT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CURR_POOL_FACTOR_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MARGIN_PRINCIPAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_INT_MO_TO_DT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_INT_DIRECTION_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_TOTS_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FILE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCING_GRP_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TODY_MARK_TO_MKT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ACCTING_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEC_CURRENCY_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SETTLEMENT_CURRENCY_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EXCHG_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_ACCRUAL_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PHYS_WIREABLE_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.INTL_DOMESTIC_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BORROW_LOAN_FEE_DAILY_FEE_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_FAIL_PRINCIPAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_FAIL_INT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CURR_FAIL_DOLLAR_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CLEARED_FAIL_DOLLAR_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.START_OF_DY_FAIL_DOLLAR_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FAIL_ADJUSTMENT_DOLLAR_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BASE_EXCHG_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EX_DIV_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUSIP_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ISIN_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PRINCIPAL_AGENT_ROLE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUST_PRINCIPAL_AGENT_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.COLLATERAL_VAL_WITH_HAIRCUT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MARGIN_MONEY_WITH_HAIRCUT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MARGIN_PCT_WITH_HAIRCUT_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.HAIRCUT_CALCULATED_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_HAIRCUT_RATE , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.AS_OF_TD_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.AS_OF_TD_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.AS_OF_TD_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SFAS_125_INCLUSION_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SYST_TM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.LINK_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCING_BROKER_CHG_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANS_FEE_AMT , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CURR_REPO_RATE_EFF_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CURR_REPO_RATE_EFF_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CURR_REPO_RATE_EFF_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_FIRM_COMM_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PENDING_ACCRUED_INT_TO_DT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FIRM_MONEY_DEPOSITORY_ACCOUNT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PYMT_MODE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DEALER_BROKER_OTHER_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FINANCE_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_NORMALIZED_TRANS_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.EXTERNAL_TRADE_SRC_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PRINCIPAL_TRADER_NAME , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.LEGAL_ETY_COST_CENTER_NAME , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SBO_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NORMALIZED_TRADE_OUTSTANDING_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NORMALIZED_TBA_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NORMALIZED_TBA_PAIR_OFF_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.USER_PROFILE_NAME , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PAIR_OFF_CNTL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.REPURCHASE_CONTRACT_AT_HAIRCUT_VAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.REPURCHASE_DEDUCTION_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.HAIRCUT_EXCESS_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.HAIRCUT_DEFICIT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.HAIRCUT_VAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CLOSING_ASK_PRICE_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BID_PRICE_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TRANSACTION_FEE_2_AMT , CASE WHEN IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DELIVERY_DT='00000000' THEN NULL when substr(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DELIVERY_DT,7,2)='00' then null ELSE TO_DATE(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DELIVERY_DT,'YYYYMMDD') END , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.COUNTRY_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.PROCESSING_FLAG , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.SEDOL_NUM , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALC_NORMALIZED_LINKED_TRD_TOTAL_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALC_DIRTY_PRICE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.ORIGINAL_FINANCE_TENOR_TYPE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TAX_WITHHOLD_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TAX_TYPE_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.TAX_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DEFAULT_FATCA_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FATCA_TAX_WITHHOLDING_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NON_RESIDENT_ALIEN_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.DROP_THROUGH_BOND_RATE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.NRA_TAX_DROP_THROUGH_WITHHOLDING_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.FATCA_TAX_CREDIT_AMT , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.MBS_POOL_TRANSACTION_CODE , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CUSTOMER_TBA_MARGIN_CODE , SUBSTR(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BIG_FIELD,1,9) , SUBSTR(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BIG_FIELD,10,15) , SUBSTR(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BIG_FIELD,25,19) , SUBSTR(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BIG_FIELD,44,19) , SUBSTR(IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.BIG_FIELD,63,17) , sysdate , 'CCAL_PKG_LOAD_IMPACT_OUT_FROM_STAGING' , sysdate , 'CCAL_PKG_LOAD_IMPACT_OUT_FROM_STAGING' , IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY.CALCULABLE_PAR_TRANS_PRICE_AMT FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY", "CCAL_FILL_OWNER", "D") ?> IMPACT_OUTSTANDING_AVY
DELETE FROM CCAL_OWNER.IMP_OTSND_AVY WHERE LAST_UDT_DTM < SYSDATE-30
